description: town located in Chiyoda-ku, Tokyo
description_wiki: Hibiya (日比谷) is a colloquial name for a neighborhood of Chiyoda Ward in Tokyo.

description: island country in East Asia
description_wiki: Japan is an island country in East Asia.

aliases: Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Japan
description: ministry in charge of the diplomatic relations of Japan with other countries
description_wiki: The Ministry of Foreign Affairs (Japanese: 外務省, Hepburn: Gaimu-shō) is an executive department of the Government of Japan, and is responsible for the country's foreign policy and international relations.

description: head of state of Japan
description_wiki: The emperor of Japan is the hereditary monarch and head of state of Japan.

description: city in King County, Washington State, USA
description_wiki: Mercer Island is a city in King County, Washington, United States, located on an island of the same name in the southern portion of Lake Washington.

description: prefecture of Japan
description_wiki: Okayama Prefecture (岡山県, Okayama-ken; Japanese pronunciation: [o.kaꜜ.ja.ma, o.ka.ja.maꜜ.keɴ]) is a prefecture of Japan located in the Chūgoku region of Honshu.

description: capital and largest city of Japan
description_wiki: Tokyo, officially the Tokyo Metropolis, is the capital and most populous city of Japan.

description: former Japanese government ministry (1872–1945)
description_wiki: The Ministry of the Navy (海軍省, Kaigun-shō) was a cabinet-level ministry in the Empire of Japan charged with the administrative affairs of the Imperial Japanese Navy (IJN).

description: government agency of Japan
description_wiki: The Ministry of Justice (法務省, Hōmu-shō) is one of the cabinet level ministries of the Japanese government.

description: private university in Shibuya, Tokyo, Japan
description_wiki: Aoyama Gakuin University (Japanese: 青山学院大学, Hepburn: Aoyama Gakuin Daigaku; AGU) is a private Christian university in Shibuya, Tokyo, Japan.

description: Founder of Nichiren Buddhism in Japan
description_wiki: Nichiren (日蓮; Japanese pronunciation: [ɲi.tɕiꜜ.ɾeɴ, ɲiꜜ.tɕi.ɾeɴ], 16 February 1222 – 13 October 1282) was a Japanese Buddhist monk and philosopher of the Kamakura period.

description: prefecture of Japan
description_wiki: Kagawa Prefecture (香川県, Kagawa-ken; Japanese pronunciation: [kaꜜ.ɡa.wa, -ŋa.wa, ka.ɡa.waꜜ.keɴ, -ŋa.waꜜ-]) is a prefecture of Japan located on the island of Shikoku.

description: prefecture of Japan
description_wiki: Hyōgo Prefecture (兵庫県, Hyōgo-ken; Japanese pronunciation: [çoꜜː.ɡo, -ŋo, çoː.ɡoꜜ.keɴ, -ŋoꜜ.keɴ]) is a prefecture of Japan located in the Kansai region of Honshu.

description: prefecture of Japan
description_wiki: Tottori Prefecture (鳥取県, Tottori-ken; Japanese pronunciation: [tot.to.ɾʲi, tot.to.ɾʲiꜜ.keɴ]) is a prefecture of Japan located in the Chūgoku region of Honshu.

description: prefecture of Japan
description_wiki: Hiroshima Prefecture (広島県, Hiroshima-ken; Japanese pronunciation: [çi.ɾo.ɕi.ma, -maꜜ.keɴ]) is a prefecture of Japan located in the Chūgoku region of Honshu.

description: prefecture of Japan
description_wiki: Shimane Prefecture (島根県, Shimane-ken; Japanese pronunciation: [ɕiꜜ.ma.ne, ɕi.ma.neꜜ.keɴ]) is a prefecture of Japan located in the Chūgoku region of Honshu.

description: country located primarily in North America
description_wiki: The United States of America (USA), also known as the United States (U.S.) or America, is a country primarily located in North America.

description: conflict between the Russian and Japanese empires from 1904 to 1905
description_wiki: The Russo-Japanese War (8 February 1904 – 5 September 1905) was fought between the Russian Empire and the Empire of Japan over rival imperial ambitions in Manchuria and the Korean Empire.

description: capital city of the province of British Columbia, Canada
description_wiki: Victoria is the capital city of the Canadian province of British Columbia, located on the southern tip of Vancouver Island off Canada's Pacific coast.

description: city in and county seat of King County, State of Washington, United States
description_wiki: Seattle (  see-AT-əl) is the most populous city in the U.S. state of Washington and the Pacific Northwest region of North America.

description: seat of Multnomah County, and largest city in state of Oregon, United States
description_wiki: Portland ( PORT-lənd) is the most populous city in the U.S. state of Oregon.

description: city in Oregon, USA
description_wiki: Pendleton is a city in and the county seat of Umatilla County, Oregon, United States.

description: city in and county seat of Union County, Oregon, United States
description_wiki: La Grande () is a city in and the county seat of Union County, Oregon, United States.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Idaho ( , EYE-də-hoe) is a landlocked state in the Pacific Northwest and Mountain West subregions of the Western United States.

description: consolidated city and county in California, United States
description_wiki: San Francisco, officially the City and County of San Francisco, is the fourth-most populous city in California and the 17th-most populous in the United States, with a population of 826,079 in 2025.

description: capital city of the U.S. state of California and seat of Sacramento County
description_wiki: Sacramento is the capital city of the U.S. state of California.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Nevada (  nə-VAD-ə; Spanish: [neˈβaða] ) is a landlocked state in the Western United States.

description: Indian religion
description_wiki: Buddhism, also known as Buddha Dharma and Dharmavinaya, is an Indian religion and philosophy based on teachings attributed to the Buddha, a śramaṇa and religious teacher who lived in the 6th or 5th century BCE. It is the world's fourth-largest religion, with about 320 million followers, known as Buddhists, who comprise 4.1% of the global population.

description: undifferentiated Japanese kana surname (かげやま)
description_wiki: Kageyama (written: 影山, 蔭山 or 景山) is a Japanese surname.

description: county seat of Fresno County, California, United States
description_wiki: Fresno ( ; Spanish for 'ash tree') is a city in the San Joaquin Valley of California, United States.
